# coupon Configuration

[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
name = "coupon-project_db"
user = "app_user"

[cache]

ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]

output = "stdout"

[features]
coupon_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
